extra.reason: Remote + CI delivered: private repo rhydlewis/z-for-finder, main pushed, GitHub Actions runs swift build + test on push/PR (verified green, run 27031980885). Test step auto-activates when 7uk lands — that ordering is the only thing that needed 7uk, not the setup itself.

Extracted pure ZFFEngine target (Place/Matcher/Ranker/Rollup/Scoring, Foundation-only); AppState now a thin shell importing it. Added Swift Testing target with 11 tests covering all regressions (separator-insensitive, name-only, deterministic order, v2 suffix, git-root rollup via temp-dir fixture, transient 0.08x down-weight). Verified red/green wiring with a deliberately-broken probe then removed it. swift test green; app builds + runs unaffected.

DECIDED: user-facing name = 'Haunt' ('your haunts' = the places you frequent). Category is clear (no rival Mac launcher/navigator named Haunt). Caveats: common word with scattered prior use (notably a Guile static-site generator); haunt.app domain is parked/for-sale. Follow-ups before branding spend: (1) consider plural 'Haunts' for a cleaner, truer namespace; (2) secure a realistic domain (gethaunt.com / haunt.tools / haunts.app); (3) App Store listing with a descriptor subtitle ('Haunt — Folder Jumper'); (4) formal USPTO trademark search in the software class. Internal name z-for-finder stays for repo/bundle id during dev.
MAS won't allow access to important files so developer ID it is

VALIDATED on Tahoe via spikes/finder-track-probe.swift. Apple Events (NSAppleScript -> Finder) reliably reads the current folder AND follows navigation: a 2s poll captured ~10 folder changes in real time (~2s latency each), zero errors. Permission = one-time Automation consent (not Accessibility/FDA), low friction. Nuances for impl: prefer 'target of front Finder window' over 'insertion location' (latter can diverge, reflecting a selected subfolder); live-nav ingests noise (/Applications, Screenshots, transient/deep paths) that the RANKING layer must down-weight, not the tracker. Production impl = wire the fork's FinderTracker (correct approach, currently dead code) into canonical — tracked in docs/harvest-plan.md.

Live Finder-navigation tracking shipped and verified on main (Session 5). FinderTracker polls Finder front-window via Apple Events into AppState.trackNavigation when Learn-from-navigation is on; pure filter+dedupe unit-tested; 144 tests + swift build green. Real-folder navigation records to frecency.json within ~2-3s and OFF stops polling, both verified live.
gethaunts.app registered by Rhyd (2026-06-06). Domain secured.
Decided: NOT shipping via Mac App Store. Distribution = Developer ID + notarization + Sparkle (the sandbox conflicts with Apple-Events Finder tracking + Sparkle). Closes the MAS option.
